title: Kamoer X1 PRO T2 small programmable auto dosing pump 24V 110 ml/min calcium pump Wi-Fi control continuous flow stepper motor adjustable peristaltic pump for aquarium

variation_files.prompt: A close-up product shot of the peristaltic pump resting in the palm of a person’s hand, showcasing its compact size and portability. The hand is positioned with the palm facing upward, gently cradling the device, emphasizing its lightweight and handheld design. The background is a clean, plain white, ensuring full focus on the product and the hand holding it. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the contours and form of the pump and the natural texture of the skin. The composition is centered, with the product and hand occupying the lower half of the frame, creating a sense of scale and human interaction. The overall aesthetic is minimal, clinical, and professional, suitable for a product demonstration or promotional material.
